title: clock-in
description: a mod that adds a clock widget that lets you view the time easily in the hud
body:
# Clock-In

A compact, dependency-free clock HUD mod that puts the time exactly where you want it - and actually lets you *see* where that is.

Instead of blindly typing coordinates and reloading to check, Clock-In gives you a live drag-and-drop interface. Click the clock, drag it anywhere on screen, and it snaps into place. Everything you'd want to tweak is right there in the HUD config bar - no config files, no guessing.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hAqTIZb2Ti4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Features

- **Drag-and-drop positioning** - open the config screen with `=` (rebindable) and drag the clock wherever you want it
- **Scale** - make it as small or as large as you like
- **Color & opacity** - full RGB color picker with an opacity slider for both the text and the background
- **Background** - optional background box with adjustable X and Y padding
- **Text shadow** - toggle on or off
- **12-hour / 24-hour format** - switch with a single button
- **Custom text** - use `%time%` anywhere in your own message to embed the current time
- **Precise controls** - sliders for position with double-click-to-type for exact values
- **No dependencies** - drop it in and go

---

## FAQ

**More versions when?**
Join the Discord and tell me what version you want next!

**Forge when?**
Not soon.

**X loader when?**
WIP - ask in the Discord for a status update on whatever you're looking for.

---

0.1: created the mod  
0.1: added coloring functionalities  
0.1: added dynamic position changing  
0.2: fixed errors  
0.3: scaling is now possible,   
0.3: shifting or left-clicking to set the watch's position is now possible
